data.name: Futage Age of futanari: Captain Greerin
data.detailed_description:
In a world mirroring our own, a catastrophic virus transformed every woman into a futanari and nearly eradicated men, leaving only a few immune survivors.

A society driven by near-uncontrollable desire and lust.

A visual novel following Junior Agent Emilia Katz as she delivers a critical package to her cunning captain, Violet Greerin. Explore their charged interactions through branching choices and gripping dialogue in this short, immersive story.

Key Features:

• Branching choices.

• A provocative, futuristic world driven by intense desires.

• Compelling characters.

• A concise, captivating experience for visual novel enthusiasts.

• Two endings.

data.short_description: A captivating visual novel with branching choices set in a unique world of futanari and rare males. Follow Emilia Katz as she visits her captain, Violet Greerin's apartment, and uncover their dynamic interactions in this short, engaging, choice-driven story.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: 64-bit Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
